title: Silence SMP CIT
description:
A resource pack made for a small SMP named the "Silence SMP" which changes some textures to help the mod and the datapacks the server is running on.

Created By: SpanishJalapeno
body: This is a resource pack created specifaclly for a small SMP called the Silence SMP this resource pack works only with CIT resewn and makes the gold block change texture when named "Revive Head" and it also makes the black dye turn into another texture when named "Trim Power".
